intent: We need a fresh slice provisioned for the remote surgery pilot at the university hospital.
Spin up a slice for the upcoming smart port trial starting next Monday.
The logistics operator requires a dedicated slice for their autonomous forklift fleet.
Provision a new network slice for the augmented reality training application at the mining site.
A new public safety agency is onboarding and needs an isolated slice for mission-critical communications.
The broadcaster needs a slice reserved for live 8K video uplink during the championship finals.
Bring up a slice for the drone delivery service operating in the northern industrial zone.
The fleet management service has been decommissioned; we can release the slice that was supporting it.
The pilot program for the smart grid ended last week. Please clean up the associated slice.
Shut down the media streaming slice we set up for the film festival — the event is over.
The enterprise contract for the warehouse automation service has expired. Remove their slice.
We're decommissioning the legacy eMBB slice that was serving the downtown retail zone.
Tear down the temporary slice that was deployed for the international summit last month.
The V2X slice used for the highway trial corridor is no longer required. Please free up those resources.
Can you pull up an overview of all slices currently running in the network?
What slices do we have active in the eastern region right now?
Show me all slice instances along with their associated tenant information.
I need to see the full inventory of deployed slices before the capacity review meeting.
Provide a summary of all active network slices and their current operational state.
List the slices that are currently assigned to enterprise customers.
The arena event is drawing more attendees than expected. We need to raise the device capacity on that slice.
Expand the subscriber ceiling for the connected campus slice — student enrollment just increased.
We have more sensors coming online in the manufacturing plant. The slice needs to accommodate additional endpoints.
Reduce the device limit on the entertainment slice during off-peak hours to free up capacity.
The wearable health monitoring deployment is scaling up. Raise the endpoint quota on the medical slice.
We're adding a second shift at the factory. The slice should support the additional worker terminals.
Lower the registered device ceiling for the retail slice now that the holiday campaign has ended.
The concurrent session cap on the IoT agriculture slice needs to go up before the harvest season.
Too many users are getting session establishment failures on the broadband slice. Raise the session limit.
We're seeing session congestion on the logistics slice. Increase the maximum concurrent data sessions.
The telemedicine platform expects high concurrent usage this afternoon. Adjust the session quota on the healthcare slice.
Reduce the number of allowed simultaneous connections on the guest Wi-Fi offload slice during maintenance.
Set a higher ceiling for active bearer sessions on the autonomous vehicle slice ahead of the city-wide test.
The radio share assigned to the URLLC industrial slice is too low. We need to give it more spectrum.
Increase the proportion of radio resources dedicated to the emergency services slice at the gNodeB level.
The eMBB slice is starving for throughput on the highway corridor. Bump its air interface allocation.
Pull back the RAN resource share for the low-priority IoT slice and reallocate it to the critical service.
We need a higher radio resource ratio for the slice serving the live concert venue tonight.
The video surveillance slice is dropping frames due to insufficient bandwidth at the base station. Please adjust the allocation.
Revise the radio resource percentage assigned to the connected car slice for the weekend trial.
Cap the number of simultaneously connected control-plane users on the emergency slice in the downtown cluster.
The signaling load on the gNodeB is spiking. Lower the RRC connection ceiling for the broadband slice group.
Increase the allowed RRC connections for the public safety slice during the large-scale emergency drill.
We need to limit how many users can maintain a radio connection simultaneously on the event slice.
The control-plane resource at the base station is under pressure. Tighten the connected-user limit for the IoT slice group.
Raise the maximum RRC-connected count for the critical infrastructure slice during the planned stress test.
There are multiple latency spikes reported by the enterprise customers in sector 4. What could be causing this?
The core network throughput dropped by 30% after last night's software upgrade. Can you investigate?
We're getting customer complaints about dropped calls near the new residential development on the west side.
Can you check if the S1 interface utilization is within the acceptable threshold for the morning peak?
One of our enterprise clients is asking why their invoice shows a higher data usage charge than expected this month.
